# terrible_cisco_mso_ndo_l3out_bgp_peer (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `address_families` (String) The address family controls for the BGP peer.
- `admin_state` (String) The administrative state of the L3Out BGP Peer. Defaults to `enabled` when unset during creation.
- `allowed_self_as_count` (Number) The allowed self-AS count of the L3Out BGP Peer. Defaults to 3 when unset during creation. The value must be between 1 and 10.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `auth_password` (String) The authentication password of the L3Out BGP Peer.
- `bgp_controls` (String) The BGP control settings for the peer.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `ebgp_multi_hop_ttl` (Number) The TTL for eBGP multi-hop of the L3Out BGP Peer. Defaults to 1 when unset during creation. The value must be between 1 and 255.
- `encapsulation_type` (String) The encapsulation type of the interface.
- `encapsulation_value` (Number) The encapsulation value of the interface. The option `encapsulation_type=vlan`, specifies VLAN ID which must be in the range 1 - 4094. The option `encapsulation_type=vxlan`, specifies VXLAN Network Identifier (VNI) which must be in the range 5000 - 16777215.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `export_route_map` (String) The name of the export route map. Providing an empty dictionary will remove the `export_route_map={}` from the L3Out BGP Peer. This parameter can be used instead of `export_route_map_uuid`.
- `export_route_map_uuid` (String) The UUID of the export route map. Providing an empty string will remove the `export_route_map_uuid=""` from the L3Out BGP Peer. This parameter can be used instead of `export_route_map`.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `import_route_map` (String) The name of the import route map. Providing an empty dictionary will remove the `import_route_map={}` from the L3Out BGP Peer. This parameter can be used instead of `import_route_map_uuid`.
- `import_route_map_uuid` (String) The UUID of the import route map. Providing an empty string will remove the `import_route_map_uuid=""` from the L3Out BGP Peer. This parameter can be used instead of `import_route_map`.
- `ipv4_address` (String) The IPv4 address of the L3Out BGP Peer. Providing an empty string will remove the `ipv4_address=""` from the L3Out BGP Peer.
- `ipv6_address` (String) The IPv6 address of the L3Out BGP Peer. Providing an empty string will remove the `ipv6_address=""` from the L3Out BGP Peer.
- `l3out` (String) The name of the L3Out. This parameter or `l3out_uuid` is required.
- `l3out_uuid` (String) The UUID of the L3Out. This parameter or `l3out` is required.
- `local_asn` (String) The local autonomous system number (ASN) of the L3Out BGP Peer. The value must be between 1 and 4294967295. Providing an empty string will remove the `local_asn=""` from the L3Out BGP Peer.
- `local_asn_config` (String) The configuration for local ASN of the L3Out BGP Peer.
- `node_group` (String) The name of the Node Group Policy.
- `node_id` (String) The ID of the node (border leaf switch).
- `parent_type` (String) The parent type of the L3Out.
- `path` (String) The path of the interface. The path must be an existing physical port (eg. eth1/1).
- `peer_controls` (String) The Peer control settings for the BGP peer.
- `peer_prefix` (String) The name of the peer prefix. Providing an empty dictionary will remove the `peer_prefix={}` from the L3Out BGP Peer. This parameter can be used instead of `peer_prefix_uuid`.
- `peer_prefix_uuid` (String) The UUID of the peer prefix. Providing an empty string will remove the `peer_prefix_uuid=""` from the L3Out BGP Peer. This parameter can be used instead of `peer_prefix`.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port_channel` (String) The port channel details.
- `private_as_controls` (String) The private AS control settings for the BGP peer.
- `remote_asn` (String) The remote autonomous system number (ASN) of the L3Out BGP Peer. The value must be between 1 and 4294967295. Providing an empty string will remove the `remote_asn=""` from the L3Out BGP Peer.
- `site_of_origin` (String) The site of origin for the L3Out BGP Peer. The value must adhere to the pattern "extended:as2-nn2:1000:65534".
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `absent` for removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects. Use `present` for creating or updating.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `template` (String) The name of the L3Out template. This parameter or `template_id` is required.
- `template_id` (String) The ID of the L3Out template. This parameter or `template` is required.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `virtual_port_channel` (String) The virtual port channel details.
- `weight` (String) The weight of the L3Out BGP Peer. The value must be between 1 and 65535. Providing an empty string will remove the `weight=""` from the L3Out BGP Peer.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
